metadata.title: Stayin Alive
metadata.lyrics:
[00:13.38] Well, you can tell by the way I use my walk
[00:16.18] I'm a woman's man, no time to talk
[00:18.75] Music loud and women warm
[00:20.67] I've been kicked around since I was born
[00:23.05] And now it's all right, that's okay
[00:25.74] You may look the other way
[00:27.91] We can try to understand
[00:30.36] The New York Times' effect on man
[00:32.62] Whether you're a brother or whether you're a mother
[00:34.87] You're stayin' alive, stayin' alive
